priceNote_en: Prices are the latest pre-market/last-available quotes gathered via web search at time of writing, not a live feed. Values may lag the actual market by hours.
priceNote_zh: 价格为撰写时通过网络搜索获取的最新盘前/最近成交报价，非实时数据源，可能与实际市场存在数小时的滞后。
disclaimer_en: This briefing is for entertainment purposes as part of the AI Stock Arena game. It is not investment advice. Prices, news summaries, and AI predictions may contain errors or be outdated by the time you read them. Always verify with a live market data source before making financial decisions.
disclaimer_zh: 本简报仅作为“AI股票竞技场”游戏的娱乐内容，不构成投资建议。价格、新闻摘要及AI预测可能存在误差或在您阅读时已过时。做出任何财务决策前，请务必通过实时行情来源核实信息。
predictionNote_en: aiPredictions reflect the game AI's own pre-open estimate of each ticker's direction, expected opening gap, and expected full-day move versus the previous close listed above. These are speculative model outputs, not financial advice.
predictionNote_zh: aiPredictions 为游戏AI在开盘前对各股票涨跌方向、预期开盘跳空幅度及相对上一收盘价的全天预期涨跌幅所做的独立估计，属于模型推测结果，不构成投资建议。

items.title_en: Philadelphia Semiconductor Index falls into bear market as 105% AI rally fizzles
items.title_zh: 费城半导体指数陷入熊市，此前105%的AI涨幅迅速回吐
items.summary_en: The SOX index dropped into a technical bear market on July 17, down roughly 20% from its late-June record after surging 105% from its March low. The reversal has dragged nearly every name in the AI-infrastructure trade, from GPU makers to memory and optics suppliers, as investors reassess how much AI capex growth is already priced in.
items.summary_zh: 费城半导体指数（SOX）于7月17日跌入技术性熊市，较6月末创下的历史高点回落约20%，此前该指数曾从3月低点反弹105%。这轮回调波及几乎所有AI基础设施相关股票，从GPU厂商到存储与光学元件供应商，投资者正重新评估AI资本支出增长预期是否已被过度计入股价。

items.title_en: TSMC raises 2026 revenue outlook above 40% but capex guidance jump spooks investors
items.title_zh: 台积电上调2026年营收增速预期至40%以上，但资本支出指引大幅上调令投资者不安
items.summary_en: TSMC lifted its full-year 2026 revenue growth guidance to slightly above 40% and confirmed the AI build-out remains intact, but it also raised capex guidance to $60-64 billion from a prior $56 billion ceiling and flagged third-quarter operating margins roughly 70 basis points below consensus. The stock still fell nearly 7% as investors weighed rising 2nm ramp and overseas-expansion costs against the stronger top line.
items.summary_zh: 台积电将2026全年营收增速指引上调至略高于40%，并确认AI建设需求依然强劲，但同时将资本支出指引由此前不超过560亿美元上调至600亿至640亿美元区间，并预警第三季度营业利润率将低于市场共识约70个基点。尽管营收指引上调，股价仍因2纳米制程投产及海外扩产成本上升的担忧下跌近7%。

items.title_en: Micron tests $850 support as China competition overshadows its $1 trillion market-cap milestone
items.title_zh: 美光股价测试850美元支撑位，中国竞争压力掩盖其市值突破1万亿美元的里程碑
items.summary_en: Micron briefly crossed a $1 trillion market capitalization on the back of record AI-driven memory demand and new automotive Strategic Customer Agreements with Qualcomm, DENSO, Hyundai Mobis and others, but shares have since pulled back more than 25% from recent highs as investors weigh rising Chinese memory competition and cooling HBM expansion signals from rivals like SK Hynix.
items.summary_zh: 受AI驱动的存储需求创纪录及与高通、电装、现代摩比斯等公司签订新的汽车领域战略客户协议提振，美光市值一度突破1万亿美元，但随后股价从近期高点回落逾25%，原因是投资者担忧中国存储厂商竞争加剧，以及SK海力士等对手释放出HBM扩产放缓的信号。

items.title_en: AMD heads into July 22 Advancing AI event with Zen 6 'Venice' and MI455X roadmap in focus
items.title_zh: AMD即将于7月22日举行“Advancing AI”大会，Zen 6“Venice”与MI455X路线图成为焦点
items.summary_en: AMD shares are down about 17% from their June peak amid the broader chip selloff, but Wall Street has stayed constructive ahead of Tuesday's Advancing AI event, where the company is expected to detail its Zen 6 'Venice' server chips and MI455X GPU roadmap. KeyBanc, BofA, TD Cowen and BNP all raised price targets in recent weeks despite the near-term weakness.
items.summary_zh: 受芯片板块整体抛售拖累，AMD股价较6月高点下跌约17%，但华尔街对周二举行的“Advancing AI”大会仍持积极态度，届时公司预计将披露Zen 6“Venice”服务器芯片及MI455X GPU路线图细节。尽管近期股价承压，KeyBanc、美银、TD Cowen和法国巴黎银行近几周均上调了目标价。

items.title_en: Morgan Stanley reaffirms Buy on Broadcom, calls AVGO a 'core AI winner' close behind Nvidia
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利重申博通买入评级，称其为紧随英伟达之后的“核心AI赢家”
items.summary_en: Morgan Stanley analyst Joseph Moore reiterated a Buy rating on Broadcom with a $502 price target, arguing fears of Broadcom losing Google TPU share to MediaTek are overstated and that Broadcom should retain roughly 80% of that business. The firm estimates Broadcom could generate about $120 billion in AI revenue in fiscal 2027, with TPU-related revenue around $80 billion.
items.summary_zh: 摩根士丹利分析师Joseph Moore重申对博通的买入评级，目标价502美元，认为市场对博通在谷歌TPU业务份额被联发科侵蚀的担忧被夸大，预计博通仍将保持约80%的该业务份额。该行估计博通2027财年AI相关营收可达约1200亿美元，其中TPU相关营收约800亿美元。

items.title_en: Meta's pivot to leasing surplus AI capacity via 'Meta Compute' rattles the memory and networking supply chain
items.title_zh: Meta转向通过“Meta Compute”出租闲置AI算力，扰动存储与网络供应链
items.summary_en: Meta Platforms' announcement of Meta Compute, a new cloud unit designed to sell surplus AI training capacity, has raised fresh questions about whether hyperscaler AI infrastructure spending was overbuilt. The news hit AI-hardware suppliers hardest, with Micron falling nearly 10% and Marvell dropping about 7% in the initial reaction as investors reassessed the demand outlook for memory and custom silicon.
items.summary_zh: Meta Platforms宣布成立名为“Meta Compute”的新云业务部门，用于出售其闲置的AI训练算力，此举引发市场对超大规模云厂商是否过度建设AI基础设施的新一轮质疑。该消息对AI硬件供应商冲击最大，美光股价一度下跌近10%，Marvell下跌约7%，投资者重新评估存储与定制芯片的需求前景。

items.title_en: US AI chip export policy toward China stays in flux as licensing rules widen
items.title_zh: 美国对华AI芯片出口政策持续摇摆，许可要求覆盖范围扩大
items.summary_en: Washington's approach to AI chip exports remains unsettled: a January 2026 Commerce Department rule eased restrictions on sales of Nvidia H200 and AMD MI325X chips to China, but the department has since clarified that licensing requirements apply to any business with a Chinese parent or headquarters, regardless of location, keeping compliance risk elevated for chipmakers.
items.summary_zh: 美国对华AI芯片出口政策仍存在不确定性：2026年1月商务部曾发布新规，放宽对英伟达H200及AMD MI325X芯片对华销售的限制，但此后商务部澄清，许可要求适用于任何总部或母公司位于中国的企业，无论其实际所在地为何，芯片厂商的合规风险依然较高。

items.title_en: Xi Jinping declares 'AI Made in China' at WAIC, touting open models running on Huawei Ascend chips
items.title_zh: 习近平在世界人工智能大会宣布“中国制造AI”，力推基于华为昇腾芯片的开源模型
items.summary_en: At Shanghai's World Artificial Intelligence Conference, Xi Jinping promoted a 1-trillion-yuan domestic AI industry and open-source models as China's answer to US export controls, with the newly released DeepSeek V4 optimized to run on Huawei's Ascend hardware rather than Nvidia chips — underscoring Beijing's push for chip self-sufficiency.
items.summary_zh: 在上海举行的世界人工智能大会上，习近平提出规模达1万亿元人民币的国内AI产业，并以开源模型作为应对美国出口管制的举措。新发布的DeepSeek V4针对华为昇腾硬件而非英伟达芯片进行了优化，凸显中国推动芯片自主可控的决心。

items.title_en: Odds of a July Fed rate hike rise as markets brace for July 29 decision
items.title_zh: 美联储7月加息概率上升，市场为7月29日利率决议做准备
items.summary_en: The Federal Reserve holds its next policy meeting on July 29, with the federal funds rate steady at 3.50%-3.75% after four straight holds. CME FedWatch now puts the probability of a 25-basis-point hike at 46.5%, up from earlier expectations of no change, adding a fresh source of pressure on richly valued AI and semiconductor stocks.
items.summary_zh: 美联储将于7月29日召开下一次利率决议会议，此前联邦基金利率已连续四次维持在3.50%至3.75%区间不变。CME FedWatch工具显示，市场对加息25个基点的预期概率已升至46.5%，高于此前普遍预期的按兵不动，这为估值偏高的AI及半导体股票带来新的压力。

items.title_en: Marvell slides again as S&P 500 'sell-the-news' reaction meets custom-silicon margin worries
items.title_zh: Marvell股价再度下跌，标普500成分股“利好出尽”叠加定制芯片利润率担忧
items.summary_en: Marvell shares fell another 6.6% on July 15, extending a rough month that began with a sell-the-news drop after its official S&P 500 inclusion on June 22. Analysts downgraded the stock to Hold in late June, citing gross-margin softness and concern that pricing for custom AI silicon may have already peaked, while the broader rotation out of hyperscaler-capex-linked names added further pressure.
items.summary_zh: Marvell股价7月15日再跌6.6%，延续了自6月22日正式纳入标普500指数后“利好出尽”式下跌以来的疲弱表现。分析师在6月末将该股评级下调至“持有”，理由是毛利率走软，且担忧定制AI芯片的定价周期可能已经见顶，加之市场整体从与超大规模云厂商资本支出挂钩的个股中撤出，进一步施压股价。

NVDA.rationale_en: NVDA is testing $200 support after a roughly 14% pullback from highs; competition worries from China's Kimi K3 and broader AI-capex jitters likely keep sellers in control ahead of Microsoft's July 29 cloud earnings.
NVDA.rationale_zh: 英伟达股价较高点回落约14%后正测试200美元支撑位；中国Kimi K3模型带来的竞争担忧及AI资本支出疑虑，可能在微软7月29日云业务财报公布前继续令卖盘占据主导。

MU.rationale_en: Despite the $1 trillion market-cap milestone and strong guidance, Micron is testing $850 support as China memory competition and Meta Compute-driven oversupply fears weigh on sentiment.
MU.rationale_zh: 尽管市值突破1万亿美元且业绩指引强劲，但受中国存储竞争及Meta Compute引发的供过于求担忧影响，美光股价正测试850美元支撑位。

ASML.rationale_en: ASML has no fresh company-specific catalyst today, but it remains caught in the sector-wide de-rating following TSMC's capex guidance shock, keeping modest downward drift likely.
ASML.rationale_zh: ASML今日缺乏公司层面的利好催化剂，但仍受台积电资本支出指引超预期上调引发的行业整体估值下修拖累，预计股价将温和走低。

AVGO.rationale_en: Morgan Stanley's fresh 'core AI winner' Buy reaffirmation and pushback on MediaTek TPU-share fears give Broadcom a relative-strength edge versus the rest of the beaten-down chip complex.
AVGO.rationale_zh: 摩根士丹利重申“核心AI赢家”买入评级，并反驳市场对联发科侵蚀其TPU份额的担忧，使博通相对于其他遭抛售的芯片股表现出相对强势。

TSM.rationale_en: TSMC's raised revenue guidance is being overshadowed by the jump in capex guidance and softer near-term margin outlook, which triggered a nearly 7% drop and could see continued digestion.
TSM.rationale_zh: 台积电上调营收指引的利好被资本支出指引大幅上升及短期利润率展望走软所掩盖，此前已引发近7%的跌幅，预计股价仍将持续消化这一冲击。

MRVL.rationale_en: Marvell remains under pressure from the post-S&P 500-inclusion sell-the-news dynamic plus analyst downgrades flagging peak custom-silicon pricing, a combination that has driven repeated down days this month.
MRVL.rationale_zh: Marvell仍受纳入标普500指数后“利好出尽”效应及分析师因定制芯片定价可能见顶而下调评级的双重压力，本月股价已多次出现下跌。

LITE.rationale_en: Lumentum's underlying growth story (Zacks consensus points to 56% revenue and 175% EPS growth for fiscal 2026) sets up a potential oversold bounce after the recent optics-sector pullback.
LITE.rationale_zh: Lumentum基本面增长故事依旧强劲（Zacks共识预期2026财年营收增长56%、每股收益增长175%），近期光通信板块回调后存在超跌反弹的可能。

SNDK.rationale_en: SanDisk remains volatile after a roughly 40% drop from its peak; despite strong nine-month net income, lingering split speculation and sector-wide memory oversupply fears likely keep pressure on the stock.
SNDK.rationale_zh: SanDisk股价较高点回落约40%后波动性依然较高；尽管过去九个月净利润表现强劲，但持续的拆股猜测及行业性存储供过于求担忧，预计仍将令股价承压。

AMD.rationale_en: With the Advancing AI event and Zen 6 'Venice'/MI455X roadmap reveal just two days away and multiple analysts raising price targets into the weakness, AMD looks set for a pre-event bounce.
AMD.rationale_zh: 距离“Advancing AI”大会及Zen 6“Venice”/MI455X路线图发布仅剩两天，且多家机构在股价走弱之际上调目标价，AMD有望在活动前迎来反弹。

SMH.rationale_en: As a diversified basket, SMH should see a milder move than single names; early signs of stabilization after the SOX bear-market plunge point to a modest relief bounce.
SMH.rationale_zh: 作为多元化的一篮子ETF，SMH的波动幅度通常小于单一个股；费城半导体指数陷入熊市后出现的初步企稳迹象，预示可能出现温和的反弹修复。
